author: anon-a7c6025f
content: Delivered: autograd engine with Arc-based Tensor identity sharing. graph.rs: backward() with Kahn's topological sort, gradient accumulation on leaf tensors. no_grad.rs: thread-local gradient suppression. checkpoint.rs: gradient checkpointing via forward recomputation. Key fix: refactored Tensor to wrap Arc<TensorInner> so clone() shares identity and grad Mutex — essential for backward to write gradients to the user's tensors. 41/41 tests passing including 4 backward correctness tests (add, mul, shared input, chain).
